modeling_constraints: Use deterministic voltage-domain behavioral Verilog-A suitable for transient simulation.
Use public voltage contributions only and preserve the declared artifact and module interfaces.
Do not hard-code evaluator stimulus, sample windows, checker tolerances, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Reset or disabled operation drives RF and debug outputs to vcm and clears quad_ok.
I and Q debug outputs equal vcm plus the specified signed LO products, including the negative Q-path convention.
rf_out equals the bounded sum of the I and Q path contributions about vcm.
quad_ok asserts only after each LO input has crossed threshold since the latest reset or enable event.

title: I/Q Upconversion Mixer Chain
